name: CeraVe Hydrating Cleanser
description: A gentle cleanser with ceramides and hyaluronic acid that helps restore the skin barrier.

name: L'Oréal Revitalift Moisturizer
description: An anti-aging moisturizer that helps reduce the appearance of wrinkles and improve skin firmness.

name: Garnier Fructis Sleek & Shine Shampoo
description: A smoothing shampoo that helps reduce frizz and leaves hair soft and shiny.

name: Lancôme Teint Idole Foundation
description: A long-wear foundation that provides buildable coverage with a natural-looking finish.

name: YSL Libre Eau de Parfum
description: A bold floral fragrance with notes of lavender, orange blossom, and vanilla.
